title: Consulting company wanting to Implement for Sales and need Vonage integration
excerpt: Need to integration phone column to dial the Vonage click to call service, also i have developed my own pass through web service we could call out to, as well.  Need general implementation help

posts.author: jaymccormick (Jay McCormick)
posts.cookedHtml: Need to integration phone column to dial the Vonage click to call service, also i have developed my own pass through web service we could call out to, as well. Need general implementation help

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Jay!

Glad to e-meet you, wishing you a very Happy New Year.

We at thespelas.com have a great deal of experience at creating integrations . Could you please describe a little more in detail exactly what you want to achieve?

Alternatively, please do not hesitate to set up a call with @Athlos here so we can discuss directly what your needs are.

Looking forward to hearing back from you.

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @jaymccormick and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

This sounds like an interesting project and I would be interested to see how the team at CarbonWeb can help. We have developed a Phone Dialing tool known as the PhoneBurner app which has click-to-dial functionality as well as a wide variety of other enhanced features.

That said, we love taking on new and complex API projects to develop custom scenarios. I would be interested in grabbing an initial meeting with you to see how our team here might be able to help.

Feel free to grab some time here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you develop your monday.com environment!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co
